strategic_direction.title: Review and Optimize Top Performing Ads
strategic_direction.reasoning: The team is already planning to analyze and cut underperforming ads. Prioritizing this allows for a quick win by focusing budget on what's working and maximizing ROI. This aligns with the action item 'Look at the ads that are performing, and let's put The most emphasis on those. and cut out any fat that isn't working'.

strategic_direction.title: Website Performance Audit & Recommendations
strategic_direction.reasoning: As Prosper Group scales their coaching business, a high-performing website is crucial for lead generation and customer retention. Offering a website audit will reveal areas for improvement and demonstrate B3X's expertise in full-funnel marketing. This could lead to an upsell of B3X's website services.

strategic_direction.title: Automated Email Sequence Optimization
strategic_direction.reasoning: With the webinar funnel in progress, it's vital to ensure the email follow-up sequence is optimized for conversions. Reviewing and refining the email sequence will help maximize the value of leads generated from the webinar and ensure leads are nurtured after the webinar replay is used.

suggested_agenda.notes: Review top-performing ads, discuss budget allocation, and confirm ad cut-off after webinar starts.

suggested_agenda.notes: Remind client to provide EverWebinar login details and confirm decision on ad budget increase.

Outline clear next steps for both B3X and the client.

strategic_direction.title: Unblock Funnel Infrastructure
strategic_direction.reasoning: We have several 'Agreed' items tied to EverWebinar. Without the login and replay update, the email-marketing and funnel-campaign services are paralyzed. This is the top priority for the next 48 hours.

strategic_direction.title: Coaching Landing Page Audit (Website Upsell)
strategic_direction.reasoning: Since 'website' is a service gap, proposing a dedicated landing page refresh or technical site audit makes sense now that ads are active. Higher conversion on the site will maximize the ROI of the proposed ad budget increase.

strategic_direction.title: Webinar-to-Email Retargeting Sequence
strategic_direction.reasoning: In the coaching industry, the sale often happens in the follow-up. Once the follow-up flow is confirmed, we should move toward a long-term 'indoctrination' sequence to nurture those who didn't book a call immediately.

Review the email flow status and integration of the new webinar replay.
Introduce the value of a website/landing page refresh to lower CPL (Lead-in for Website upsell).

For instance, Model B incorrectly categorized 'Provide EverWebinar login' as 'crm-automation' and changed many `owner_side` classifications. Model A, although not perfect, provides better task category selection and assignment of owners.

Model B classified task #3 'Confirm webinar follow-up flow' under client instead of b3x.
Model B classified the 5th task 'Invite friendlies' under email-marketing instead of funnel-campaign.
Model B classified the 9th task owner_name as Bill instead of Null.
Model B incorrectly classified 'Send Outlook email forwarding instructions' under 'website' instead of 'client-ops' and changed the 'task_type' and 'owner_side'.
Model B misclassified some owner sides, which Model A had correct

roadmap.reasoning: Model B demonstrates superior performance in detecting discussed items and deriving accurate status changes with supporting evidence. While both models identify new items effectively, Model B's classifications and overall accuracy in reflecting the meeting's outcomes are stronger.
specific_differences: Model B more accurately detects which existing roadmap items were discussed in the meeting.
Model B provides more granular status updates (e.g., 'in-progress', 'done') with relevant transcript evidence, while Model A mostly indicates 'unchanged'.
Model B extracts a greater number of new actionable items from the meeting transcript.
Model A fails to update roadmap item 10 although it is the basis of a new item
Model A extracts 2 updates related to incorporating the webinar reply, model B incorporates them as a VIP update for the webinar.

Model B's strategic item 'Unblock Funnel Infrastructure' is very direct and specific, indicating a clear, immediate priority.
